overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting a first-person view from a vessel's bridge navigating through a harbor at night. The scene features functional navigation displays including radar and nautical charts while the ship approaches distant shoreline lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation consoles overlooking harbor approach

events.description: vessel approaches closer to harbor infrastructure with dock structures becoming visible on the starboard side

agents.ego_description: navigating the ship through the harbor channel at night while monitoring radar and chart displays

entered.detail: navigation monitor showing colored nautical chart with depth contours and restricted zones
circular radar screen with rotating sweep displaying surrounding landmasses and navigation hazards
blue-toned monitor displaying ship telemetry and navigation system data
forward deck structure with metal railings visible through the bridge front windows
distant illuminated shoreline indicating the port facilities ahead

segments.scene_description: A nighttime ship bridge scene from a simulator game, showing three operational navigation monitors and a view over the bow deck toward a distant harbor. The vessel maintains steady forward progress through calm waters as the radar continuously scans the surroundings, with dock structures gradually becoming visible on the approach to port.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward progression from the interior of a ship's bridge toward the illuminated structures of a distant harbor at night. It begins with a view of three operational navigation monitors and a scanning radar, providing a technical backdrop to the vessel's steady movement. As the ship glides through calm waters, the perspective shifts toward the bow deck, where the dark horizon gradually reveals the faint outlines of the port. The scene then expands as the distant dock structures become increasingly visible and defined against the night sky, marking the final approach to the harbor.
